description: You are a nurse care coordinator at Hillside Family Medicine completing medication reconciliation for Sherill Botsford (DOB: January 24, 1995) following hospitalization for hypertensive crisis. Log in as demo_provider (password: Provider1234!). Update the patient's medication list by discontinuing the pre-admission doses of Lisinopril 5mg and Amlodipine 5mg, and adding the new dose-adjusted versions: Lisinopril 10mg daily and Amlodipine 10mg daily. Create an encounter to document this post-hospitalization medication reconciliation visit.

metadata.occupation_context: Nurse Care Coordinator — post-hospitalization medication reconciliation
required_actions: Create encounter for medication reconciliation visit

expected_db_state.rx_list: Lisinopril 5mg and Amlodipine 5mg discontinued (rxl_date_inactive set); Lisinopril 10mg and Amlodipine 10mg active
